Package iwedia.dtv.reminder

Class ReminderControl

java.lang.Object
iwedia.dtv.DtvControl<com.iwedia.dtv.reminder.IReminderControl>
iwedia.dtv.reminder.ReminderControl
public class ReminderControl extends DtvControl<com.iwedia.dtv.reminder.IReminderControl>
Base class for reminder functionalities.

  • Method Details

    • createTimer

      public com.iwedia.dtv.A4TVStatus createTimer(com.iwedia.dtv.reminder.ReminderTimerParam param)
      Creates timer reminder.
      Parameters:
      param - Create parameters for timer reminder.

    • createSmart

      public com.iwedia.dtv.A4TVStatus createSmart(com.iwedia.dtv.reminder.ReminderSmartParam reminderSmartParam)
      Creates smart reminder.
      Parameters:
      reminderSmartParam - Create parameters for smart reminder.

    • cancel

      public com.iwedia.dtv.A4TVStatus cancel(int handle)
      Stops a reminder. Reminder will not trigger start and end time callback function. Reminder will remain in the list, can be removed with @link #destroy().
      Parameters:
      handle - - Handle of the reminder to be stoped.

    • destroy

      public com.iwedia.dtv.A4TVStatus destroy(int handle)
      Stops and destroys reminder.
      Parameters:
      handle - Handle identifier for specific reminder.

    • updateList

      public int updateList()
      Updates the reminder list.
      Returns:
      Number of reminders in list.

    • setListSortMode

      public com.iwedia.dtv.A4TVStatus setListSortMode(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrSortMode mode)
      Sets the sort mode for reminder list.
      Parameters:
      mode - Desired sort mode (PvrSortMode).

    • getListSortMode

      public com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrSortMode getListSortMode()
      Gets reminder list active sort mode.
      Returns:
      Active sort mode (PvrSortMode).

    • setListSortOrder

      public com.iwedia.dtv.A4TVStatus setListSortOrder(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrSortOrder order)
      Sets reminder list sort order.
      Parameters:
      order - Desired sort order (PvrSortOrder).

    • getListSortOrder

      public com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrSortOrder getListSortOrder()
      Gets reminder list active sort order.
      Returns:
      Active sort order (PvrSortOrder).

    • getType

      public com.iwedia.dtv.reminder.ReminderType getType(int handle)
      Returns reminder type for specific event in reminder list.
      Parameters:
      handle - Handle of the specific reminder in reminder list.
      Returns:
      Type of the specific reminder (ReminderType).

    • getTimerInfo

      public com.iwedia.dtv.reminder.ReminderTimerInfo getTimerInfo(int handle)
      Returns reminder timer info for specific event in reminder list.
      Parameters:
      handle - Handle of the specific reminder in reminder list.
      Returns:
      Timer reminder info (ReminderTimerInfo).

    • getSmartInfo

      public com.iwedia.dtv.reminder.ReminderSmartInfo getSmartInfo(int handle)
      Returns reminder smart info for specific event in reminder list.
      Parameters:
      handle - Handle of the specific reminder in reminder list.
      Returns:
      Smart reminder info (ReminderSmartInfo).

    • getReminderHandle

      public int getReminderHandle(int index)
      Returns reminder handle based on its index.
